title: Bihar Elections 2025: Key issues dominate debates in Rajnagar
snippet_text: As the election campaign intensifies, voters in Rajnagar assembly constituency raise questions about infrastructure development, road connectivity, and agricultural support schemes.

title: Women voters of Rajnagar demand better primary healthcare and clean water
snippet_text: A coalition of local self-help groups in Rajnagar has presented a list of demands to major political parties emphasizing sanitational assets.

title: Independent candidates emerge as spoilers in Rajnagar triangular contest
snippet_text: With rebel leaders refusing to withdraw their nominations in Rajnagar, political analysts predict a tight multi-cornered fight.

title: Voter turnout expected to touch record highs in Rajnagar
snippet_text: Electoral awareness campaigns and intense political mobilization by party workers point to a high turnout of youth and women voters in Rajnagar constituency.

title: Political rally in Rajnagar draws massive crowds ahead of voting day
snippet_text: Top party leaders addressed a massive rally in Rajnagar promising job creations, free electricity, and specialized sub-plans for rural developmental bounds.
